---
title: "Comprehensive Peacebuilding on the Korean Peninsula: An Introduction"
date: 2023-07
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
  - name: Brendan M. Howe
    url: https://hufs.academia.edu/%EC%8B%9C%EC%97%B0%EC%9E%A5
    orcid: 0000-0001-9603-2792
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [Korea, Inter-Korean, international relations, foreign policy, 2023]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan</strong> and Brendan M. Howe (2023), “Comprehensive Peacebuilding on the Korean Peninsula: An Introduction,” in Kadir Jun Ayhan and Brendan M. Howe (eds.) <em>Comprehensive Peacebuilding on the Korean Peninsula: Internal Dynamics in North Korea and South Korean Approaches</em>, Palgrave Macmillan
---

## Information

The book is forthcoming in Summer 2023.

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@incollection{ayhan_comprehensive_2023,
	title = {Comprehensive Peacebuilding on the Korean Peninsula: An Introduction},
	booktitle = {Comprehensive Peacebuilding on the Korean Peninsula: Internal Dynamics in North Korea and South Korean Approaches},
	publisher = {Palgrave Macmillan},
	author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun and Howe, Brendan M.},
	editor = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun and Howe, Brendan M.},
	date = {2023},
}
```
